response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified the primary performance as '絶対的アイドル' by Amane Kanata from her graduation live. 2. Performed searches for '天音かなた 絶対的 lyrics' and related queries. The song appears to be a brand new original work, and public official lyrics were not fully indexed. 3. Conducted a best-effort transcription of the lyrics from the audio. 4. Mapped the video into four distinct scenes based on visual and audio content. 5. Generated the JSON according to the required schema.
response.global_summary: This video is a performance of the original song "絶対的アイドル" (The Absolute Idol) by Amane Kanata during her graduation concert, followed by a retrospective montage of her career.

scenes.description: Amane Kanata performs her original song "絶対的アイドル" (The Absolute Idol) on stage. The song title is displayed on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
始まりの音がした
いつかは終わると知ってた
... (Transcription of the performance lyrics) ...
今世界で一番幸せなアイドルから
世界で一番の笑顔をあげちゃう
僕を見つけてくれた 愛してくれた
だから
まだまだ終わらない ちゃんとついてきて
きらめく夢へ
...
今世界で一番幸せなアイドルから
世界で一番の大好きをあげちゃう
些細な日常も もっと大きなステージも
まだまだ終われ ない ありふれ た奇跡を
君と結んでく
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: (Partial translation based on audio transcription) The beginning of the sound, I knew it would end someday... [Lyrics continue]... I am the happiest idol in the world, giving the biggest smile... I won't end it yet, stay by my side. The strongest idol I always wanted to be... I will tie these miracles with you.

scenes.description: A retrospective montage of Amane Kanata's performances throughout her career.
Ending sequence with the concert logo.
